phrases.intent_en: Ask where exactly Joan of Arc was burned
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous m'indiquer l'endroit précis où Jeanne d'Arc a été brûlée ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-vay-VOO mahn-dee-KAY lahn-DRWAH pray-SEE oo ZHAHN dark ah ay-TAY broo-LAY
phrases.cultural_note: Joan of Arc was burned at the stake on this square on 30 May 1431 at age 19. A large cross and plaque mark the approximate site. The modern Église Sainte-Jeanne-d'Arc, built in 1979, stands nearby in her memory.

responses.english: It is marked by the plaque on the ground.
responses.phonetic: say tahn-dee-KAY par lah PLAK oh SOL
responses.local: C'est indiqué par la plaque au sol.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the market opens
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ouvre le marché ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR OOV-ruh luh mar-SHAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Place du Vieux-Marché hosts a regular market.

responses.english: In the morning, from eight o'clock.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the market held on the square
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un marché sur cette place le matin ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn mar-SHAY soor set PLASS luh mah-TAHN
phrases.cultural_note: A traditional morning market is held on the Place du Vieux-Marché every day except Monday. It is one of Rouen's oldest markets and sells fresh produce, cheese, fish, and flowers.

responses.english: The market is in the morning, except Monday.
responses.phonetic: luh mar-SHAY eh luh mah-TAHN sohf luh luhn-DEE
responses.local: Le marché est le matin, sauf le lundi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a recommendation for lunch on the square
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous me recommander un bon restaurant sur la place pour déjeuner ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-vay-VOO muh ruh-koh-mahn-DAY uhn bohn res-toh-RAHN soor lah PLASS poor day-zhuh-NAY
phrases.cultural_note: The square is lined with restaurants. Look for Norman specialities such as tripes à la mode de Caen, sole normande, and tarte aux pommes. Ask specifically for cuisine normande for the most authentic experience.

responses.english: There are good restaurants around the square.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah duh bohn res-toh-RAHN oh-TOOR duh lah PLAHSS
responses.local: Il y a de bons restaurants autour de la place.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a good restaurant recommendation nearby
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous me recommander un bon restaurant à proximité ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-vay-VOO muh ruh-koh-mahn-DAY uhn bohn res-toh-RAHN ah prok-see-mee-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: The square is lined with restaurants serving traditional Norman cuisine.

responses.english: There are several good restaurants around the square.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah ploo-ZYUR bohn res-toh-RAHN oh-TOOR duh lah PLAHSS
responses.local: Il y a plusieurs bons restaurants autour de la place.
